_inspectorSnowReport.Report:
Monday March 9th | 5:49 

Bonjour Tremblant,

Spring has arrived on the mountain today, bringing mild temperatures and wind. Our mountain teams are out early and working hard across the slopes to deliver the best conditions possible so everyone can get out, enjoy the fresh air, and make the most of their day on the mountain with us. As spring conditions can vary from run to run and change throughout the day, we encourage everyone to exercise caution and ski safe. 

Be sure to check the Mountain Info Report page regularly, as many runs will open progressively throughout the day. 

First Tracks: Access to designated lifts on both North and South sides as early as 7:45 a.m., with skiing on North Side slopes at 8 a.m.

Please note that Alpine Touring and Snowshoeing trails are also affected by the mild temperatures. Be sure to check what’s open before heading out so you can plan your outing accordingly. 

Enjoy your day on the mountain and ski safely!

Mountain safety tip of the week: Slow down in reduced‑speed zones.
Reduced‑speed areas mean it’s time to slow down for your safety and the safety of others.
Remember, you’re sharing the slopes with other skiers and riders. Stay cautious at all times.
Some zones marked in yellow on the trail map require reduced speed. Please be considerate, and ski or ride slowly in these areas out of respect for the higher traffic.

Snow fall is recorded daily at 5 a.m from mid-mountain at North Side (550 m / 1,800 ft). This data, based on 24 hours, provides a picture of on-mountain conditions. Actual accumulation may differ from the official report. Be aware of changing conditions. Lifts and trails exist in a mountain environment and may close due to weather, usage and/or special maintenance.
_inspectorSnowReport.SafetyReport: Happy Monday! Spring conditions on the mountain today with mild temperatures and wind. Our teams are working hard to deliver the best possible conditions. Runs will open progressively—please check the Mountain Info Report regularly and ski with caution as conditions may vary. Please note that all glade trails are closed today. Enjoy your day on the mountain and ski safely!
_inspectorSnowReport.SafetyReportFrench: Bon lundi! Conditions printanières à la montagne aujourd’hui avec des températures douces et du vent. Nos équipes travaillent fort afin d’offrir les meilleures conditions possibles. Les pistes ouvriront progressivement — veuillez consulter régulièrement le rapport Conditions  Info Montagne et skier avec prudence, car les conditions peuvent varier. Veuillez noter que tous les sous-bois sont fermés aujourd’hui.
